task_completion.description: Verify that the Vital Signs CRF is available in the system and assigned to the Week 4 Follow-up event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenClinica interface, the 'Vital Signs' CRF is visible in the event definition for 'Week 4 Follow-up', or there is a success message showing the CRF was uploaded from /home/ga/Desktop/vital_signs_crf.xls.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event is scheduled for the primary subject DM-105 on the correct date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject Matrix or View Subject screen for DM-105 shows the 'Week 4 Follow-up' event with a scheduled date of 2024-03-01.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct vital signs from the duplicate record were entered into DM-105's CRF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data entry screen or view mode for the Vital Signs CRF for DM-105 displays the exact values: Systolic Blood Pressure (135), Diastolic Blood Pressure (85), Heart Rate (72), Body Temperature (36.5), and Weight (80.5).

task_completion.description: Verify that the Vital Signs CRF for DM-105 has been marked as Complete.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status icon for the Vital Signs CRF under DM-105's Week 4 Follow-up event shows as 'Complete' (typically indicated by a green checkmark icon or 'Completed' text).

task_completion.description: Verify that the duplicate subject DM-106 has been removed from the study.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Subject Matrix or subject list, DM-106 has a status of 'Removed' (often indicated by a red 'X' icon), or there is a confirmation message showing DM-106 was deleted/removed.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the OpenClinica web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the OpenClinica web application in a browser, not terminal commands (like psql or curl) directly modifying the database.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fake the completion by typing the expected values into a text editor or a mocked HTML page.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data entry and status changes must appear within the genuine OpenClinica interface with its standard layout, menus, and styling.

integrity.description: Ensure the CRF upload (if performed) was done via the browser's file upload dialog.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the CRF was uploaded, there should be evidence of the file path '/home/ga/Desktop/vital_signs_crf.xls' being selected in the browser's file input field or upload confirmation screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Primary Subject: DM-105. Duplicate Subject to remove: DM-106. Target Event: 'Week 4 Follow-up'. Target Event Date: 2024-03-01. Expected Vital Signs to enter for DM-105: Systolic BP: 135, Diastolic BP: 85, Heart Rate: 72, Body Temperature: 36.5, Weight: 80.5. CRF Template Path: /home/ga/Desktop/vital_signs_crf.xls.
